SystemStatus.Description: Test failure, system status not correct

ModuleLinkupFailure.Description: Unable to connect to SRS module

ModuleFaults.Description: DTCs recorded in the Airbag Module

PartNumberMismatch.Description: Part Number programmed in ORC does not match Broadcast

ModuleDisabled.Description: Airbag Module Could Not Be Enabled

ModuleFault_80011A.Description: Driver Front Airbag 1st Stage Resistance Too Low
